meta.title: David Kim | UX/UI Designer
meta.description: Portfolio of David Kim, UX/UI Designer with experience in branding, digital design, and product development.

about.title: About
about.heading: Flutter Developer and UX/UI Designer focused on digital products.
about.description: I build projects that connect design and technology with a strong focus on usability, clarity, and outcomes. On GitHub, I work across Flutter, web, and backend stacks (TypeScript, Dart, Java, HTML/CSS). On Behance, I publish Graphic Design, Branding, and Social Media pieces, frequently using Adobe Illustrator.

list.name: davidkim.github.io
